source_pr.title: topsql: fix the issue of TopSQL doesn't catch the scan_rows of DDL executions
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #33202

Problem Summary: Fix the issue of TopSQL doesn't catch the scan_rows of DDL executions

### What is changed and how it works?


### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

TiDB
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/26020263/159840882-0c9ad8f8-d199-48cf-9899-0a3a0234921f.png)

TiKV
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/26020263/159840846-0368b66a-0d5d-4c7a-9a37-f527982f188c.png)


### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: topsql: fix the issue of TopSQL doesn't catch the scan_rows of DDL executions.
fix_pattern: topsql: fix the issue of TopSQL doesn't catch the scan_rows of DDL executions

evidence: files: ddl/backfilling.go, ddl/column.go, ddl/ddl_worker.go, ddl/index.go, ddl/partition.go, ddl/reorg.go, ddl/reorg_test.go, ddl/restart_test.go, ddl/table.go, go.mod, go.sum, server/tidb_test.go
